arguments.query: using-superpowers skill invocation guidance skills available

arguments.content: You are helping build a React 2048 game. First, inspect /workspace/game-2048 if it exists and summarize current contents, likely stack, and any blockers. Be concise.

arguments.command_line: cd /workspace && npm create vite@latest game-2048 -- --template react-ts
cd /workspace/game-2048 && npm install && npm install -D vitest jsdom @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom

arguments.content:
export const BOARD_SIZE = 4

export type CellValue = number | null
export type Board = CellValue[][]

export type Direction = 'up' | 'down' | 'left' | 'right'

export interface MoveResult {
  board: Board
  scoreGained: number
  moved: boolean
  won: boolean
  gameOver: boolean
}

export interface SpawnRandom {
  index: number
  value: 2 | 4
}

export interface GameSnapshot {
  board: Board
  score: number
  won: boolean
  gameOver: boolean
}

interface ScorePanelProps { score: number status: string onRestart: () => void } export function ScorePanel({ score, status, onRestart }: ScorePanelProps) { return (
Score {score}
Status {status}
) }

import { StrictMode } from 'react'
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client'
import './index.css'
import App from './App'

createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!).render(
  <StrictMode>
    <App />
  </StrictMode>,
)

arguments.command_line: cd /workspace/game-2048 && npm test && npm run build
cd /workspace/game-2048 && npm test && npm run build
